questions.question:
You are a retail clerk who typically works Monday through Friday. You arrive at work and notice the new schedule is posted, and your manager has given you a Saturday shift. It happens to be your son's birthday on Saturday, and you have a party planned. What is the most appropriate response?



Verbal Aptitude: ISRO CSE 2023 | Question: 86
options: Speak with your manager and explain you have a birthday party planned for your son on Saturday and ask if they can find someone else or if you can find someone to cover your shift
Ask your coworkers if they can cover your shift because you have a birthday party for your son planned 7
Pretend like you did not see the schedule since you always work Monday through Friday and do not show up on Saturday
Do not say anything to anyone, and plan on calling in sick on Saturday
questions.correct_answer: Speak with your manager and explain you have a birthday party planned for your son on Saturday and ask if they can find someone else or if you can find someone to cover your shift
